ruleset.name: com.github.exabrial-java25-parent-pom-pmd-ruleset
ruleset.description: PMD ruleset for com.github.exabrial java25-parent-pom - extends maven-pmd-plugin defaults

property.name: violationSuppressRegex
property.value: .*Unnecessary modifier 'final' on method.*the method is already in a final class.*
